docs.title: Welcome to the Minor Planet Center's   Public Documentation Hub
docs.text:
This site is a landing-page providing simplified access to the MPC's complex existing public documentation pages.

As we improve the documentation, more details will be consolidated here.

For now, this page serves as a map into the existing documentation.

Use the buttons below to navigate to specific topics of interest.

docs.title: Data & Services
docs.text:
This page provides links to various MPC pages that document how to use the MPC's data products and services.

As we improve the documentation, more details will be consolidated here, but for now, this page serves as a map into the existing documentation.

docs.title: Submit Data
docs.text:
This page provides links to various MPC pages that document how to submit observations to the MPC.

As we improve the documentation, more details will be consolidated here, but for now, this page serves as a map into the existing documentation.
